acceptance_criteria.text: Operator can generate reply drafts for already stored unanswered reviews without refreshing maps or writing to external providers.
proof: Bulk flow reads externalbusinessreviews, saves reviewreplydrafts, and reports no external calls or writes.

acceptance_criteria.text: The bulk generation path uses paid compute preflight, reserve, generate, finalize charge, and release on total failure.
proof: Service calls existing Operator paid compute credit services.
tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py covers charge and release paths.

acceptance_criteria.text: Insufficient credits block the action and return billing path.
proof: Insufficient balance test returns /dashboard/billing and creates no drafts.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web Operator exposes bulk review reply generation and shows created drafts.
proof: OperatorPage adds review_replies_generate launch button and multiple-draft rendering.

acceptance_criteria.text: Docs describe Sprint 26 without unsupported provider-write claims.
proof: Updated LocalOS Operator docs, tool registry, and agent index.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_inbox.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_telegram_response_router.py
known_gaps: News generation, social post generation, service optimization execution, Apify cost settlement, and external map publication remain future work.
